com.pax.poslink

Class ManageRequest.ApplePayVAS

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.ApplePayVAS
  • Enclosing class:
    ManageRequest

    public static class ManageRequest.ApplePayVAS
extends java.lang.Object

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      java.lang.String KeyFileMapping
      Enter the key file names in the same order so that it corresponds with the Merchant IDs being set in VAS Data.
      java.lang.String MerchantID
      Max 5 merchant ID’s connect by '#'.
      java.lang.String Url
      Merchant URL,, Eg.
      java.lang.String UrlMode
      0 - Full VAS Mode
      1 - URL mode

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    • Field Detail

      • MerchantID

        public java.lang.String MerchantID
        Max 5 merchant ID’s connect by '#'. Each merchant ID (0, 36].
        Merchant IDs should not be overwritten unless the merchant ID parameter is sent in the request.

        Attribute: ans...180

      • UrlMode

        public java.lang.String UrlMode
        0 - Full VAS Mode
        1 - URL mode

        Attribute: n1

      • Url

        public java.lang.String Url
        Merchant URL,, Eg. www.apple.com

        Attribute: ans...64

      • KeyFileMapping

        public java.lang.String KeyFileMapping
        Enter the key file names in the same order so that it corresponds with the Merchant IDs being set in VAS Data. The total number of key files entered must match the total number of Merchant IDs entered. Each key file name will be connected by “#”.
        Example of Valid Key File Name: VAS_KEY3.PEM

        Attribute: ans...64

    • Constructor Detail

      • ApplePayVAS

        public ApplePayVAS()
